prompt: generate a photorealistic confusing, multilingual receipt from a tourist in Bangkok, showing a long list of unfamiliar snacks, mistranslated as “Squid sky rollers” and “Laughing bean paste bun.” Scribbled note: “Was this lunch?”
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic, crumpled receipt from a street vendor in Bangkok. The receipt is prominently multilingual, featuring Thai script with some English text. It displays a long, itemized list of unfamiliar snack purchases. Among the items, clearly visible entries include "Squid sky rollers" and "Laughing bean paste bun," presented as humorous mistranslations from their Thai originals. The receipt shows a total amount in Thai Baht (฿). A handwritten note, "Was this lunch?", is scribbled in blue or black ink across the bottom margin of the receipt.
objects: Itemized list of snack purchases on receipt
"Laughing bean paste bun" text on receipt
Handwritten note "Was this lunch?" across the bottom margin of the receipt
Blue or black ink for the handwritten note
